dnd5e-divinitypoints.resourceNote: The name used for the resource item on character sheets.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.dpResourceBarActive: Displays a resource bar in the character sheet sidebar.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.dpGmOnlyNote: Uncheck to allow players to configure the item from their character sheet.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.dpChatPrivateHint: Whispers expenditure messages to the GM only.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.alreadyDpItemOwned: This character already has a {dpResource} item. Please remove the duplicate.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.updateDpMaxTooltip: Re-evaluate the formula and update the maximum.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.noDpItem: {actorName} does not have a {dpResource} feature on their sheet.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.notEnoughDp: {actorName} does not have enough {dpResource} to use this ability.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.starterItemReady: "{name}" has been added to your world's Items tab. Drag it onto any character sheet to grant them {dpResource}. To make an ability cost {dpResource}, open it → Activation → Consumption → add entry → Type: {dpResource}.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.dpBlockOnInsufficie: When enabled, abilities with a {dpResource} cost will be blocked if the character lacks sufficient points or has no {dpResource} feature on their sheet.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.colorSettingsHint: Open the colour picker to customise the resource bar gradient and animation.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.dpLongRestRecoveryH: How much is recovered on a long rest.
